query:
SELECT positionId, COUNT(*) as category_count FROM position_categories GROUP BY positionId ORDER BY positionId;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_questions FROM position_questions;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT positionId, COUNT(*) as category_count FROM position_categories GROUP BY positionId ORDER BY positionId;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_questions FROM position_questions;
